meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: A Freelancer’s Guide to Shipping Faster
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Master debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code. A professional, step-by-step checklist for freelancers to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop manual debugging. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for terminal-based remediation, you transform your workflow from reactive fire-fighting to proactive code engineering. This systematic approach reduces downtime, eliminates context switching, and allows you to deliver high-quality, production-ready code to clients in half the time.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and your codebase has turned into a labyrinth of cryptic errors. You’ve tried every LLM on the market, but the endless tab-switching and copy-pasting are only deepening your cognitive load. You’re not just fighting bugs; you’re fighting the tools meant to help you.

It’s time to move beyond the browser-based chat interface. True engineering velocity comes from deep terminal integration and context-aware debugging. We are stripping away the noise to show you how to weaponize your development environment, turning your IDE into a high-octane engine that solves complex logic failures while you focus on the architecture.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before fixing, isolate the error. Use Antigravity to map the dependency chain and identify exactly which module is triggering the cascade failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file structure and identify the most likely root cause for [INSERT ERROR]. Map the dependency graph and suggest the primary failure point.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/ --query 'Identify the root cause of the current build failure.'

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your stack trace directly into the terminal so the AI can correlate logs with actual file content without manual copy-pasting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the provided stack trace: [INSERT STACK TRACE]. Cross-reference this with the existing logic in the identified files and propose a structural fix.

steps.title: Hypothesis Generation
steps.description: Don't just fix the line; fix the logic. Ask the AI to propose three distinct architectural approaches to resolve the bug while maintaining performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose three architectural refactors to solve the identified bug. Rank them by technical debt impact and execution speed for a solo freelancer.

steps.title: Implementation & Verification
steps.description: Execute the fix within the CLI. Use automated testing hooks to ensure your fix doesn't introduce regressions elsewhere in the project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the code implementation for [CHOSEN SOLUTION]. Include unit test snippets to verify the fix immediately.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file ./src/target.ts --apply 'Implement the proposed refactor and run npm test'

steps.title: Documentation for the Client
steps.description: Turn your debug session into a professional handover. Generate a brief summary of what was broken and how it was hardened for the future.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a concise, professional summary for the client explaining the bug, the fix, and the long-term benefit of this refactor.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file ./DEBUG_LOG.md --content 'Summarize the fix for the client'

pro_tips: Always set your context window by explicitly defining the 'project scope' in your initial Antigravity session to prevent hallucinated imports.
Use Claude Code's --watch flag during debugging to trigger automated linting checks the moment you apply a fix.
Keep a 'Prompt Library' file in your root directory; reuse the most successful Antigravity prompts to maintain consistency across different client projects.
When facing complex state issues, use Claude Code to run 'ls -R' on the project folders to give the AI a complete map of your file system before requesting a fix.
Treat your AI as a Senior Developer; if the output seems generic, ask it to 'critique its own suggestion for edge cases' to force deeper reasoning.
resources: Effective Prompt Engineering for Devs: https://www.promptingguide.ai
content.next_steps: Integrate these tools into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the initial triage phase of every bug report you receive.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with fragmented workflows and start building with the precision of a lead engineer. Stop wasting time on manual debugging and start delivering high-impact code that wins you recurring client work. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
